creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Lorenzo Salvadore from comment #8)

I gather your sequence does not, of itself, involve
testing building ports such that the builds use
-stdlib=libc++ instead of the an implicit
-stdlib=libstdc++ . Just the relevant g++*'s would
be built to allow -stdlib=libc++ to be tried.

By contrast, Jan's activity would involve some use of
-stdlib=libc++ with some g++* .

Together those seem to have a fair amount of coverage.
There is probably no grand, immediate switching of
lots of ports to -stdlib=libc++ use expected.

Overall, sounds good to me.
